title: EQ - Custom EQ, change the value on the slider, Reset EQ
scenario: Custom EQ slider values do not reset to default middle position when tapping Reset EQ button in Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings
Adjust one or more slider values (e.g., move sliders up or down from the default middle position)
expected: All slider circles return to the default (middle) position.
